en: A PSALM OF DAVID. The earth is the LORD's and the fullness thereof, the world and those who dwell therein,
zh: 地和地上所充滿的， 世界和住在世上的，都是屬於耶和華的。

en: for he has founded it upon the seas and established it upon the rivers.
zh: 因為他把地奠定在海上， 使世界安定在眾水之上。

en: Who shall ascend the hill of the LORD? And who shall stand in his holy place?
zh: 誰能登上耶和華的山？ 誰能站在他的聖所中呢？

en: He who has clean hands and a pure heart, who does not lift up his soul to what is false and does not swear deceitfully.
zh: 就是手潔心清的人， 他不傾向虛妄， 起誓不懷詭詐。

en: He will receive blessing from the LORD and righteousness from the God of his salvation.
zh: 他必領受從耶和華來的福分， 也必蒙拯救他的 神稱他為義。

en: Such is the generation of those who seek him, who seek the face of the God of Jacob. Selah
zh: 這就是求問耶和華的那一類人， 就是尋求你面的雅各。

en: Lift up your heads, O gates! And be lifted up, O ancient doors, that the King of glory may come in.
zh: 眾城門哪！抬起你們的頭來； 古老的門戶啊！你們要被舉起， 好讓榮耀的王進來。

en: Who is this King of glory? The LORD, strong and mighty, the LORD, mighty in battle!
zh: 那榮耀的王是誰呢？ 就是強而有力的耶和華， 在戰場上大有能力的耶和華。

en: Lift up your heads, O gates! And lift them up, O ancient doors, that the King of glory may come in.
zh: 眾城門哪！抬起你們的頭來； 古老的門戶啊！你們要被舉起， 好讓榮耀的王進來。

en: Who is this King of glory? The LORD of hosts, he is the King of glory! Selah
zh: 那榮耀的王是誰呢？ 萬軍之耶和華，他就是那榮耀的王。
